results.rendered_html:
amarāvatī (von amara, vgl.  P. 6,3,119 .) f. der Sitz der Unsterblichen:
1〉 Indraʼs Stadt  AK. 1,1,1,40 .  TRIK. 1,1,60 .  H. 178 . an. 3,513 .  MED. r. 104 .  ARJ. 4,46 .  INDR. 1,42 .  R. 1,6,5 . 3,53,37 .  HARIV. 8942 . 13895 . u. s. w.  PAÑCAT. 83,16 .  VP. 71 .
— 2〉 eine Stadt in Berar  COLEBR. Misc. Ess. II, 453 .

results.rendered_html:
amarāvatī [amara-vat, ra being changed to rā by  P. VI. 3. 119 ]
1 Abode of the gods, residence of Indra (said to be above Meru or the sun's orb; cf.  Ki. 7. 2 ); sasaṃbhrameṃdradrutapātitārgalā nimīlitākṣīva bhiyā'marāvatī  K. P. 1. 
2 N. of a modern town in Berar, Amraoti.
